bird.name: 迪亚曼蒂纳刀翅蜂鸟
bird.summary: 迪亚曼蒂纳刀翅蜂鸟（学名：Campylopterus diamantinensis），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 迪亚曼蒂纳刀翅蜂鸟体重约8.3克，翼长约72.3毫米，嘴峰长约30.2毫米，喙宽度约2.7毫米，喙厚度约2.9毫米，跗蹠长约5.6毫米，尾长约47毫米。迪亚曼蒂纳刀…

relations.subject: 迪亚曼蒂纳刀翅蜂鸟
relations.evidence: Its already restricted habitat is projected to further decrease in area due to climate change. Its habitat "is not presently experiencing major direct human disturbance" and part of it is protected in two national parks
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

relations.subject: 迪亚曼蒂纳刀翅蜂鸟
relations.evidence: Its already restricted habitat is projected to further decrease in area due to climate change. Its habitat "is not presently experiencing major direct human disturbance" and part of it is protected in two national parks
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
